summary: A full, in-depth executive summary of the Los Romeros Limited unaudited financial statements for the year ended 31 August 2025. Covers every line item on the balance sheet and in the notes with plain-English explanations, and provides a detailed forensic analysis of the Director's Loan Account — explaining where the £25,069 came from, why it grew from £19,373 to £25,069 in a single year, and why Wincham's annual fees are the almost certain cause.
